mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages ( item_id, sender_user_id, receiver_user_id, message_body, contact, sent_at ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{senderUserId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{messageBody}, #{contact}, #{sentAt} );
mapper.select: SELECT messages.message_id AS messageId, messages.item_id AS itemId, items.item_name AS itemName, users.user_name AS senderUserName, messages.message_body AS messageBody, messages.sent_at AS sentAt FROM messages JOIN users ON messages.sender_user_id = users.user_id JOIN items ON messages.item_id = items.item_id WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} ORDER BY messages.sent_at DESC;
